⚠️ AI Content — Verify Before Publishing
  • Check all player names — are they still active?
  • Check all scores & match results — are they current?
  • Check all dates & facts — AI may use outdated data
  • Check political titles — ministers/CMs may have changed

⚙️ Portal Settings
🏏
CricAPI Key — Live Cricket Scores
Free tier: 100 calls/day · Get key at cricapi.com
How to get free key:
1. Go to cricapi.com → Click Sign Up
2. Verify email → Login → Go to Dashboard
3. Copy your API Key from the dashboard
4. Paste above → Click Save & Test
🤖
Groq API Key — AI Article Writer
Free tier: Unlimited on Llama 3.3 · Get key at console.groq.com
💡 Pro tip: Add keys from up to 4 free Groq accounts — auto-rotate instantly on 429. More keys = uninterrupted writing.
How to get free key:
1. Go to console.groq.com → Sign Up free
2. Click API Keys in left sidebar
3. Click Create API Key → Copy it
4. Paste above → Click Save & Test
📊 Current API Status
🏏 CricAPI Checking...
🤖 Groq AI Checking...
🗄️ Supabase Checking...
📣
Social Auto-Post — TeluguScoopLive
Auto-post to Telegram, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube when articles are published
⛔ You are running this as a local file (file://)
Browsers block API calls (Telegram, Facebook) from file:// URLs due to CORS security rules.
Fix: Upload index.html to your Netlify / Vercel / hosting and open it from https://teluguscooplive.com — then Test buttons will work. You can still Save your keys now; they are stored in your browser and will work once hosted.
⚠️ Setup required: Enter API tokens below. Keys are stored in your browser only (never sent to server).
📱 Telegram: Create bot via @BotFather → copy token + add bot to channel → copy Chat ID
📘 Facebook: developers.facebook.com → Graph API → Page Access Token
📸 Instagram & ▶ YouTube: Require server-side posting — use Zapier/n8n webhook bridge (see below)
📱 Telegram Bot
ℹ️ Bot must be added as Admin to your channel, and at least 1 message sent in the channel
📘 Facebook Page
ℹ️ Page ID: Go to your Facebook Page → About → scroll down to find Page ID
Auto-post when article is published
Fires for: Publish Now, Rewrite & Publish, adminTogglePublish
🗄️ ⚠️ REQUIRED: Run this SQL in Supabase → SQL Editor to fix auto-post persistence:
This fixes the "Off every time" problem. Run once, never again.
-- Step 1: Drop old blocking policy DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Admin can manage settings" ON site_settings; -- Step 2: Create table (safe to run even if exists) CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS site_settings ( key text PRIMARY KEY, value text NOT NULL, updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() ); ALTER TABLE site_settings ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; -- Step 3: Allow ANYONE to READ (needed for auto-post without login) CREATE POLICY "Public read settings" ON site_settings FOR SELECT USING (true); -- Step 4: Only logged-in admin can WRITE CREATE POLICY "Auth write settings" ON site_settings FOR ALL USING (auth.role() = 'authenticated') WITH CHECK (auth.role() = 'authenticated');
After running: Save your token + chat ID again → keys will persist forever across all devices and browser sessions.
⚡ How Auto-Posting Works:
1️⃣ You write & publish any article in Admin Panel
2️⃣ Site automatically detects the publish event
3️⃣ Instantly posts to Telegram + Facebook simultaneously

🔁 Works on ALL 3 publish methods:
  • 🌐 Publish Now button in Write Article tab
  • 🤖 Rewrite & Publish button in Pending tab
  • ✅ Toggle Publish on/off in Articles list

✅ Make sure "Auto-post when article is published" toggle is ON above
📝 Post format (Telegram / Facebook):
🚨 Breaking News
{Article Title}
Read Full Story: {Article URL}
#TeluguNews #TeluguScoopLive

ℹ️ About Us

🗞️ About TeluguScoop

TeluguScoop is a Telugu news platform delivering fast and reliable updates including local, national, and trending news. It also includes a news discussion board for public opinions.

We cover breaking news in real time across Telangana, Andhra Pradesh, and national stories — making sure every story reaches the Telugu community quickly and accurately.

📡 What We Cover

⚡ Politics — AP & Telangana state politics, national governance, policy decisions, and election coverage.

🎬 Cinema — Tollywood box office, movie reviews, star interviews, OTT releases.

🏏 CricZone — Live cricket scores, IPL coverage, player profiles, and match analysis.

💬 Discussion Board — Public space to debate and discuss news topics with fellow Telugu readers.

📍 Local News — Dedicated coverage for Telangana & Andhra Pradesh local updates.

📬 Contact Us

📧 [email protected]

📱 +91 8978213237 (WhatsApp)

For news tips, corrections, advertising, partnerships, or general inquiries.

Send us a message →

🔒 Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

1. Information We Collect

We collect your name and email when you register or contact us, plus usage data (pages visited, articles read) to improve your experience.

2. How We Use It

📌 Personalise your news feed and community features.

📌 Send breaking news notifications (only if you opt in).

📌 Respond to your support requests.

📌 Improve our platform and services.

3. Data Sharing

We never sell your data. No third-party ads. Data is only shared with our database provider (Supabase) to operate the platform.

4. Cookies & Storage

We use browser local storage to remember your preferences. No third-party tracking cookies.

5. Your Rights

Request deletion of your account and data anytime by emailing [email protected]. We process all requests within 7 days.

6. Security

We use HTTPS/TLS encryption and secure database controls. Passwords are never stored in plain text.

7. Contact

Questions? Email us: [email protected]

📄 Terms of Use

Last updated: March 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using TeluguScoop, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.

2. Use of Content

All news articles, images, and content on TeluguScoop are for personal, non-commercial use only. You may not reproduce, distribute, or republish any content without prior written permission.

3. Discussion Board

The Discussion Board is a public space for sharing opinions. You agree not to post content that is defamatory, hateful, illegal, or misleading. TeluguScoop reserves the right to remove any content that violates these guidelines.

4. User Accounts

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree not to share your account or use another person's account without permission.

5. Disclaimer

TeluguScoop provides news for informational purposes only. We strive for accuracy but do not guarantee that all content is complete or error-free. We are not liable for any decisions made based on our content.

6. Changes to Terms

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

7. Contact

For any questions about these terms, contact us at [email protected] or WhatsApp +91 8978213237.
